dockerfile_lines: RUN python -c "import urllib.request as u; u.urlretrieve('https://registry.npmmirror.com/-/binary/lark-cli/v1.0.58/lark-cli-1.0.58-linux-amd64.tar.gz','/tmp/lc.tgz')" && tar -xzf /tmp/lc.tgz -C /tmp && install -m 0755 /tmp/lark-cli /usr/local/bin/lark-cli && rm -rf /tmp/lc.tgz /tmp/lark-cli /tmp/LICENSE /tmp/README.md /tmp/CHANGELOG.md && lark-cli --version
